response.justification: Candidate has well over the 6+ years required (15+ years of experience), with a strong full-stack background in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Recent role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong software craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS) align well with quality and architecture expectations. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and Kotlin (Java only), but these are learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React full-stack experience across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP experience at current role (re:cinq)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned (Java present but dated); secondary stack partial match
Vitest not explicitly cited, though Jest-equivalent testing depth is evident

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure
